title: funckia pumila
intro: Funckia pumila, also known as dwarf funckia, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Asclepiadaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and combat infections. Funckia pumila can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of fever.
